<!-- Generated by `npm run rules:sync`. Source of truth: `.cursor/rules/`. Do not edit directly. -->

---
description: TypeScript code style for source files
globs: src/**/*.ts
---

# Code style

- No default exports, except where the platform requires one.
- Prefer small composable functions over classes; the custom element class is
  the only stateful class in the codebase.
- JSDoc on **all** public members: properties, attributes, methods, events,
  CSS parts and custom properties.
- `any` is forbidden. Use `unknown` at boundaries and narrow with the Zod
  schemas.
- Exhaustive `switch` statements must end with a `never`-typed default check.
- Every file starts with the licence header:

```ts
/*!
 * @techystuff/feature-cards — CMS-agnostic <feature-cards> Web Component
 * Copyright © 2026 Humza Butt. All rights reserved.
 * SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only
 *
 * This file is part of feature-cards, licensed under the GNU Affero
 * General Public License v3.0 only. See LICENSE for full terms.
 */
```
